title: Reference Identity Superhero Group Selfie AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Identity Superhero Group Selfie AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image ultra-realistic group selfie for a user-owned reference image for the central selfie subject, preserving the same person from the reference image. Subject: the same person from the reference image stands in the center wearing a fitted black t-shirt and ripped jeans, holding a phone for a selfie, surrounded by Chris Hemsworth as Thor, Gal Gadot as Wonder Woman, Scarlett Johansson as Black Widow, Mark Ruffalo as Hulk, Henry Cavill as Superman, and RDJ in Iron Man armor. Scene: a bright daylight casual hangout with everyone hugging and grinning like old friends creates bright daylight, friendly closeness, natural smiles, casual body language, and playful cinematic energy. Composition: Preserve the uploaded reference person identity as the central selfie subject, with a close group-selfie crop, phone-held angle, faces clustered naturally, and hugging poses around the center. Style: Ultra-realistic cinematic group selfie photography with natural authentic light, detailed faces, believable fabric and armor texture, and spontaneous social energy. Color Palette: Fixed bright daylight color, black central outfit, superhero costume accents, warm skin tones, and vivid comic-inspired details balanced by realism. Camera: Smartphone selfie perspective with slight wide-angle closeness, central raised phone, natural lens compression, and high-detail faces. Reference Image Policy: Use a user-owned or consented source image for the central person identity; preserve source identity only for the central subject. Source Image Recipe: One clear portrait or full-body reference of the central person is required before local image-to-image generation. Brand Safety: The original prompt includes celebrity likeness and superhero IP references; keep this row pending human review before public use. Restrictions: Keep faces coherent, group placement natural, central identity preserved, phone visible, daylight authentic, and output watermark-free.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
